summary: ANDROID 🟥 | FMD | Play/Pause button giving different outcomes
scenario: In FMD, after connecting a device and pressing play, stop, then play again quickly, no tone is heard on the second play and tones stack causing noise and the pause button to disappear.
description_clean: In FMD, when connecting a device and pressing play, then stop, then play again, two issues occur: (1) No tone is heard when pressing play the second time. (2) Tones can stack, producing very bad noise, and the pause button disappears, requiring the device to be turned off. This can be reproduced on every device when clicking quickly.
steps: 4. Press the play button again quickly.
expected: When pressing play the second time, a tone should be heard. The pause button should remain visible and no tone stacking or bad noise should occur.
actual: No tone is heard when pressing play the second time. Tones can stack, producing very bad noise, and the pause button disappears, requiring the device to be turned off.
